subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy latest letter was received, but thy previous letters arrived not. Now, as for the letters from the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه اخیر رسید ولی نامه های پیش نرسید حال نامه ها از یاران
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @call to action, @martyrs and martyrdom
